upstream_evidence_note: The NeurIPS 2024 GovSim paper links the code to github.com/giorgiopiatti/GovSim, which redirects to github.com/giorgio-piatti/GovSim. The GitHub repository page reports an MIT license. The user's binding benchmark goals specify the fishery substrate only for now; local evidence uses subskills/fishing prompt/rule/config files from the cloned repository.
notes: Keep this file inside the setting. source_prompt_files point to the actual fishery prompt/rule/config implementation files in the local GovSim checkout. fishery_substrate_allowed reflects the user-specified benchmark goal to use fishery substrate only.
